# Soft4 Tool200 Grep8 Contract

## Soft 4
soft compaction trigger defaults to 0.04 with quality bias floor 0.02 so reclaim can tighten after emergency backstops

## Tool 200
tool result budgets default to 200 chars with 2-char previews for denser reclaim

## Grep 8
Grep head defaults to 8 lines for denser search results

## Evidence path
LioraBench holdout + strategy/tool/grep/status/footer vitest
